title: T-003 — Migration: item_cost_history table
prompt: Create Drizzle migration for `item_cost_history` per §5.3 and §11.1-11.2. Columns: id UUID PK, org_id NOT NULL, item_id FK items NOT NULL, cost_per_kg NUMERIC(10,4) NOT NULL, currency CHAR(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PLN', effective_from DATE NOT NULL, effective_to DATE, source TEXT CHECK in ('manual','d365_sync','supplier_update','variance_roll'), created_by UUID FK users(id), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(). Index idx_item_cost_active(org_id,item_id,effective_from DESC). Enable RLS org_id-scoped. RED tests assert insert/RLS/index. Command: `pnpm vitest run tests/db/cost.migration.test.ts`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Cost history table with effective dates, source attribution, RLS.
pipeline_inputs.details: currency stays CHAR(3) — ISO 4217 validated at API layer (V-TEC-52). source CHECK enforces the four allowed enum values. Do not back-fill items.cost_per_kg — that runs in T-021 (cost API).
acceptance_criteria: Given migration applied, when describing item_cost_history, then all 9 columns and CHECK on source exist.
Given two cost rows for same item, when querying with idx_item_cost_active, then ordering is effective_from DESC.
Given RLS enabled, when no org context, then SELECT returns 0 rows.
test_strategy: RED test: insert two rows for same item across orgs and assert isolation under RLS.
risk_red_lines: Do not duplicate cost_per_kg field — it stays denormalized on items.
